type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous years data was based on source testing and emissions estimates from testing done in 1999.  New testing was carried out in 2003 and emissions are based on this test data as well as production information and usage rates provided by officials at OF

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous reports were based on source testing carried out in 1999.  New source testing was carried out in November 2003.  Emission rates are based on updated source testing measurements and usage information provided by OFI officials.
As formaldehyde is considered a VOC and emissions estimations for the formaldehyde has changed, the emissions for the VOC has also been affected.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Ammonia (30%) usage was decreased, by modifying binder formulations.

  Ammonia emission level is based on assumption, that about 50% of
NH3 reacts with formaldehyde, forming HMTA.  The remaining ammonia 
"flashes out" in forming plenum.

  Ammoni
